utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know , maybe it is best that we never got to do it again .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , it kinda makes that ... that one night special . You know , technically we still are over international waters .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am gonna go to the bathroom , maybe I will see you there in a bit ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_maybe I will see you there in a bit ?
3_I am gonna go to the bathroom , maybe I will see you there in a bit ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Felicity and I , we are watching My Giant , and I was thinking , " I’m never gonna be as good an actor as that giant . " Do you think I’m just wasting my life with this acting thing ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_I was thinking , " I’m never gonna be as good an actor as that giant . " Do you think I’m just wasting my life with this acting thing ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I mean , the giant is like five years younger than me , you know , you think I will ever get there ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But what about how much taller he is than me ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_how much taller he is than me

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I mean , there is no way I can make myself taller now , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And who knows what science will come up with in the future , but Chandler , what if I die an unsuccessful , regular sized man ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_if I die an unsuccessful , regular sized man

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , Monica , wow you have been in the bathroom for like a half ... hour .

emotion_cause.span: 16_you have been in the bathroom for like a half ... hour .
